title: Analysis Resource Envelope: FA4 B200 Read-Only Audit
summary: Execution envelope for the analysis stage: a read-only audit of existing experiment outputs, run on the local workstation with no additional compute budget required.

sections.memory: low (a few MB of predictions and metrics)
sections.wall_clock: analysis stage bounded to minutes (no new experiment launched)
sections.blocked_slices: none; no supplementary slices were needed because the existing experiment outputs already answer the evidence question.
runnable_now: read-only audit of validation_metrics.json, combined_predictions.csv, and calibration_params.json
